description: Batch-convert biological identifiers between databases via the UniProt mapping service, with automatic chunking and per-ID retry. Writes a CSV mapping table.
rules: read-only — queries the UniProt mapping API, writes local files only
input is a file of identifiers, one per line (blank lines and '#' comments skipped)
FROM_DB / TO_DB are UniProt database codes (e.g. UniProtKB_AC-ID, KEGG, GeneID, Ensembl, PDB)
results written to record_store as mapping_results.csv
usage: Set ID_FILE (one ID per line), FROM_DB (source code), TO_DB (target code). Output: mapping_results.csv.
limitation: Needs the bioservices Python package and internet access to the UniProt mapping API. Offline / package-absent runs still produce mapping_results.csv (degraded, may be empty).
